title: colchicum bivonae subsp. euboeum
intro: Colchicum bivonae subsp. euboeum is a lesser-known subspecies of the autumn crocus, a type of flowering plant in the Colchicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Colchicum bivonae subsp. euboeum are believed to include reducing pain and inflammation, and it has also been used to treat fever and rheumatism. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although its preparation and use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
